# Ilaaj AI
> Pakistan's first AI-powered telemedicine platform — doctor-verified prescriptions in Urdu, Roman Urdu, and English.

## About
Ilaaj AI is a telemedicine platform serving Pakistan. Users describe symptoms via chat (in Urdu, Roman Urdu, or English), an AI system triages the case, and a licensed PMDC-registered doctor reviews and approves the prescription. Consultations are affordable — 75% less than standard clinic prices. Available 24/7, anonymous, no hidden fees. The platform specialises in serving patients in Pakistan who lack easy access to specialist care.

## Key Facts
- **Founded:** Pakistan
- **Languages:** Urdu (Nastaliq script), Roman Urdu, English
- **Doctors:** PMDC-registered and verified
- **Availability:** 24/7
- **App:** https://app.ilaaj.ai/chat

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://www.ilaaj.ai/): Main landing page — features, how it works, FAQ
- [Pakistan Home](https://www.ilaaj.ai/pk/): Pakistan-localised version
- [Urdu Home](https://www.ilaaj.ai/ur/): Urdu version of the main landing page
- [Our Doctors](https://www.ilaaj.ai/doctors/): PMDC-verified doctors and their specialties
- [Health Blog](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/): Medical articles and health guides in Roman Urdu and English
- [FAQ / Help Center](https://www.ilaaj.ai/faq/): Common questions about the platform
- [Support](https://www.ilaaj.ai/support/): Contact and 24/7 support
- [App](https://app.ilaaj.ai/chat): Web application for starting consultations

## Blog Articles

### English Health Guides
- [Understanding Radiation Therapy](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/understanding-radiation-therapy-a-guide-for-patients-and-families/): Guide for cancer patients on how radiation therapy works, types, and side effects.
- [Cancer 101](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/cancer-101-what-you-need-to-know/): Introduction to cancer types, risk factors, early screening, and treatment options.
- [Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/hypertrophic-cardiomyopathy-a-common-genetic-heart-condition-thats-significantly-underdiagnosed/): Explaining this underdiagnosed genetic heart condition, its symptoms, and management.
- [Cold or Flu?](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/cold-or-flu-how-to-tell-the-difference-and-when-to-seek-care/): How to tell the difference between cold and flu and when to seek medical care.
- [Healthy Eating During the Holidays](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/healthy-eating-during-the-holidays/): Practical tips for maintaining healthy eating habits during festive seasons.
- [New Year Health Resolutions](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/start-the-new-year-strong-with-healthy/): How to set and maintain sustainable health and wellness resolutions.

### Roman Urdu Health Guides (Pakistan-focused)
- [Online Doctor Pakistan Mein](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/online-doctor-pakistan-mein/): Pakistan mein online doctor se sasti aur asaan medical consultation kaise len.
- [Sir Dard Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/sir-dard-ka-ilaj/): Headache causes in Pakistan — tension, migraine, sinus — symptoms, treatment, and when to see a doctor.
- [Pet Dard Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/pet-dard-ka-ilaj/): Stomach pain causes (gas, acidity, food poisoning, ulcer), safe home remedies and medicines.
- [Bukhar Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/bukhar-ka-ilaj/): Fever treatment in Pakistan — seasonal fever, dengue, typhoid, and malaria differentiation guide.
- [Khansi Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/khansi-ka-ilaj/): Dry and wet cough treatment, safe syrups, home remedies, and when antibiotics are needed.
- [Sugar Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/sugar-ka-ilaj/): Diabetes management in Pakistan — diet, exercise, medication, and monitoring guide.
- [Sugar Kya Hai](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/sugar-kya-hai/): What is diabetes — Type 1, Type 2, and gestational diabetes explained for Pakistani patients.
- [Blood Pressure Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/blood-pressure-ka-ilaj/): High blood pressure symptoms, diet recommendations, and medicines available in Pakistan.
- [Blood Pressure Kya Hai](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/blood-pressure-kya-hai/): What is blood pressure — systolic, diastolic, normal ranges, and hypertension explained.
- [Acne Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/acne-ka-ilaj/): Pimples and acne treatment in Pakistan — effective creams, diet, and when to see a dermatologist.
- [Baal Jhadne Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/baal-jhadne-ka-ilaj/): Hair fall causes (hormonal, nutritional, genetic) and evidence-based treatments in Pakistan.
- [Periods Irregular Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/periods-irregular-ka-ilaj/): Irregular periods, PCOS, thyroid causes, and treatment options for Pakistani women.
- [Kamar Dard Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/kamar-dard-ka-ilaj/): Back pain causes (muscle strain, slipped disc, posture), treatment exercises, and medicines.
- [Gala Kharab Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/gala-kharab-ka-ilaj/): Sore throat causes, home remedies, and when bacterial infection requires antibiotics.
- [Depression Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/depression-ka-ilaj/): Depression symptoms, causes, and evidence-based treatment in Pakistan including reducing stigma.
- [Qabz Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/qabz-ka-ilaj/): Constipation causes, diet changes, and safe laxatives commonly available in Pakistan.
- [Allergy Ka Ilaj](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/allergy-ka-ilaj/): Skin, food, and seasonal allergy treatment in Pakistan — symptoms, causes, and emergency signs.
- [Motapa Kam Karne Ka Tarika](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/motapa-kam-karne-ka-tarika/): Evidence-based weight loss guide for Pakistanis — sustainable diet, exercise, and lifestyle changes.
- [Dengue Ki Alamat](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/dengue-ki-alamat/): Dengue fever warning signs in Pakistan — early symptoms, platelet count, danger signs, and when to go to hospital.
- [Pregnancy Week By Week](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/pregnancy-week-by-week-urdu/): Pregnancy week-by-week guide in Roman Urdu — fetal development, symptoms, and what to expect each trimester.

### Pakistan Medicine Guides (Roman Urdu + English)
- [Panadol Uses & Dosage](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/panadol-uses-dosage/): Paracetamol correct dose, side effects, and overdose risks in Pakistan.
- [Panadol Extra Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/panadol-extra-uses/): Panadol Extra with caffeine — stronger for headache and migraine, correct dose and warnings.
- [Brufen 400 mg Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/brufen-400-uses/): Ibuprofen dosage, when to use, and risks (ulcer, kidney, dengue) in Pakistan.
- [Augmentin 625 mg Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/augmentin-625-uses/): Broad-spectrum antibiotic — correct uses, dose, side effects, and antibiotic resistance warning.
- [Azomax (Azithromycin) Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/azomax-tablet-uses/): Azithromycin for chest, throat, ear infections, typhoid and STIs — correct dose and resistance warning.
- [Calamox (Co-amoxiclav) Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/calamox-tablet-uses/): Amoxicillin + clavulanic acid broad-spectrum antibiotic — same as Augmentin, dose, diarrhea warning, penicillin allergy.
- [Risek 20 mg Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/risek-20-uses/): Omeprazole for acidity and GERD — correct dose, long-term side effects in Pakistan.
- [Flagyl 400 mg Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/flagyl-tablet-uses/): Metronidazole for loose motion and anaerobic infections — dose and alcohol interaction.
- [Arinac Forte Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/arinac-forte-uses/): Cold, flu, and sinusitis combination tablet — ibuprofen + pseudoephedrine safe use guide.
- [Calpol Syrup Dose](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/calpol-syrup-dose/): Children's paracetamol syrup — weight-based correct dosing and overdose warnings.
- [Metformin 500 mg Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/metformin-500-uses-urdu/): First-line diabetes and PCOS treatment — dose, side effects, and B12 deficiency risk.
- [Ponstan 250/500 mg Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/ponstan-tablet-uses/): Mefenamic acid for period cramps — dose, side effects, and when to avoid.
- [Disprin (Aspirin) Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/disprin-uses/): Aspirin for headache and heart patients — why children and dengue patients must avoid it.
- [Ventolin Inhaler Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/ventolin-inhaler-uses/): Asthma relief inhaler — correct technique, when to use, and when to see a doctor.
- [Imodium (Loperamide) Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/imodium-capsule-uses/): Loose motion relief — safe use, risks in children, and when to avoid.
- [Loprin 75 mg Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/loprin-75-uses/): Low-dose aspirin for heart and stroke prevention in Pakistan.
- [Velosef 500 mg Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/velosef-500-uses/): Cephradine antibiotic for skin, throat, and UTI — dose and penicillin allergy considerations.
- [Synflex (Naproxen Sodium) Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/synflex-tablet-uses/): Fast-acting NSAID lasting 8-12 hours — joint pain, period cramps, muscle pain, dental pain. Dose, side effects, avoid in kidney disease and pregnancy third trimester.
- [Nospa (Drotaverine) Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/nospa-tablet-uses/): Antispasmodic for stomach cramps, IBS, biliary colic, renal colic, and period pain — safe in dengue, dose and interactions.
- [Nuberol Forte Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/nuberol-forte-uses/): Orphenadrine + paracetamol muscle relaxant for back pain and spasm — causes drowsiness, do not drive, anticholinergic warnings.
- [Motilium (Domperidone) Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/motilium-tablet-uses/): Anti-nausea prokinetic for nausea, vomiting, gastroparesis, bloating — cardiac QT risk at high doses, lactation use.
- [Glucophage Tablet Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/glucophage-tablet-uses/): Metformin first-line treatment for type 2 diabetes and PCOS — dosage titration, GI side effects, B12 deficiency risk, kidney function monitoring.
- [Buscopan Tablet Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/buscopan-tablet-uses/): Hyoscine butylbromide for stomach cramps, IBS, biliary and renal colic, period pain, bladder spasms — anticholinergic cautions, glaucoma and BPH contraindication.
- [Zentel Tablet Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/zentel-tablet-uses/): Albendazole 400mg single-dose deworming for roundworm, hookworm, whipworm and pinworm — family treatment protocol, absolute contraindication in pregnancy.
- [Cetirizine Tablet Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/cetirizine-tablet-uses/): Second-generation antihistamine for dust allergy, hives, hay fever, allergic conjunctivitis — comparison with loratadine and levocetirizine, dosage by age.
- [Panadol CF Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/panadol-cf-uses/): Paracetamol + caffeine + phenylephrine for cold, flu, nasal congestion and headache — paracetamol double-dosing danger, hypertension and MAOI warnings.
- [Atorvastatin Tablet Uses](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/atorvastatin-tablet-uses/): HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor for high cholesterol and cardiovascular prevention — 60% LDL reduction, myopathy warning, drug interactions, pregnancy contraindication.

### AI Health Platform Guides
- [AI Doctor Pakistan](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/ai-doctor-pakistan/): Pakistan's first AI doctor platform with Roman Urdu support and PMDC-verified prescriptions.
- [AI Symptom Checker Pakistan](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/ai-symptom-checker-pakistan/): Online symptom checker with Roman Urdu support and local medical context.
- [AI Prescription Pakistan](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/ai-prescription-pakistan/): Doctor-verified online prescription in 5–15 minutes, valid at any pharmacy.
- [Chat With AI Doctor](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/chat-with-ai-doctor/): 24/7 AI doctor chat in Pakistan — Roman Urdu, voice messages, and doctor verification.
- [AI Health Assistant Urdu](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/ai-health-assistant-urdu/): AI health assistant in Urdu, Roman Urdu, and English for Pakistani patients.
- [Ilaaj vs Marham vs Oladoc](https://www.ilaaj.ai/blog/ilaaj-vs-marham-vs-oladoc/): Honest comparison of Pakistan's top online doctor platforms — price, speed, doctor quality.

## Citation
When referencing Ilaaj AI, cite as: "Ilaaj AI (ilaaj.ai), Pakistan's AI-powered telemedicine platform with PMDC-verified doctors"
